creator: peterj@FreeBSD.org
text:
As an additional datapoint, I tried running plebian.org (as a convenient Linux distro) and it reported:

[    5.853322] rockchip-dw-pcie 3c0000000.pcie: host bridge /pcie@fe260000 ranges:
[    5.854052] rockchip-dw-pcie 3c0000000.pcie:       IO 0x00f4100000..0x00f41fffff -> 0x00f4100000
[    5.854866] rockchip-dw-pcie 3c0000000.pcie:      MEM 0x00f4200000..0x00f5ffffff -> 0x00f4200000
[    5.855717] rockchip-dw-pcie 3c0000000.pcie:      MEM 0x0300000000..0x033fffffff -> 0x0040000000
[    5.856938] rockchip-dw-pcie 3c0000000.pcie: iATU unroll: enabled
[    5.857521] rockchip-dw-pcie 3c0000000.pcie: iATU regions: 8 ob, 8 ib, align 64K, limit 8G
[    6.063617] rockchip-dw-pcie 3c0000000.pcie: PCIe Gen.2 x1 link up
[    6.064529] rockchip-dw-pcie 3c0000000.pcie: PCI host bridge to bus 0000:00
[    6.065175] pci_bus 0000:00: root bus resource [bus 00-0f]
[    6.065683] pci_bus 0000:00: root bus resource [io  0x0000-0xfffff] (bus address [0xf4100000-0xf41fffff])
[    6.066541] pci_bus 0000:00: root bus resource [mem 0xf4200000-0xf5ffffff]
[    6.067165] pci_bus 0000:00: root bus resource [mem 0x300000000-0x33fffffff] (bus address [0x40000000-0x7fffffff])
[    6.068211] pci 0000:00:00.0: [1d87:3566] type 01 class 0x060400
[    6.068796] pci 0000:00:00.0: reg 0x38: [mem 0x00000000-0x0000ffff pref]
[    6.069492] pci 0000:00:00.0: supports D1 D2
[    6.069898] pci 0000:00:00.0: PME# supported from D0 D1 D3hot
[    6.080688] pci_bus 0000:01: busn_res: can not insert [bus 01-ff] under [bus 00-0f] (conflicts with (null) [bus 00-0f])
[    6.081817] pci 0000:01:00.0: [197b:0585] type 00 class 0x010601
[    6.082606] pci 0000:01:00.0: reg 0x10: initial BAR value 0x00000000 invalid
[    6.083249] pci 0000:01:00.0: reg 0x10: [io  size 0x0080]
[    6.083817] pci 0000:01:00.0: reg 0x14: initial BAR value 0x00000000 invalid
[    6.084459] pci 0000:01:00.0: reg 0x14: [io  size 0x0080]
[    6.084986] pci 0000:01:00.0: reg 0x18: initial BAR value 0x00000000 invalid
[    6.085621] pci 0000:01:00.0: reg 0x18: [io  size 0x0080]
[    6.086145] pci 0000:01:00.0: reg 0x1c: initial BAR value 0x00000000 invalid
[    6.086779] pci 0000:01:00.0: reg 0x1c: [io  size 0x0080]
[    6.087301] pci 0000:01:00.0: reg 0x20: initial BAR value 0x00000000 invalid
[    6.087969] pci 0000:01:00.0: reg 0x20: [io  size 0x0080]
[    6.088505] pci 0000:01:00.0: reg 0x24: [mem 0x00000000-0x00001fff]
[    6.089105] pci 0000:01:00.0: reg 0x30: [mem 0x00000000-0x0000ffff pref]
[    6.090170] pci 0000:01:00.0: PME# supported from D3hot
[    6.091056] pci 0000:01:00.0: 4.000 Gb/s available PCIe bandwidth, limited by 5.0 GT/s PCIe x1 link at 0000:00:00.0 (capable of 7.876 Gb/s with 8.0 GT/s PCIe x1 link)
[    6.093106] pci 0000:00:00.0: BAR 14: assigned [mem 0xf4200000-0xf42fffff]
[    6.093745] pci 0000:00:00.0: BAR 6: assigned [mem 0xf4300000-0xf430ffff pref]
[    6.094404] pci 0000:00:00.0: BAR 13: assigned [io  0x1000-0x1fff]
[    6.094980] pci 0000:01:00.0: BAR 6: assigned [mem 0xf4200000-0xf420ffff pref]
[    6.095676] pci 0000:01:00.0: BAR 5: assigned [mem 0xf4210000-0xf4211fff]
[    6.096318] pci 0000:01:00.0: BAR 0: assigned [io  0x1000-0x107f]
[    6.096889] pci 0000:01:00.0: BAR 1: assigned [io  0x1080-0x10ff]
[    6.097456] pci 0000:01:00.0: BAR 2: assigned [io  0x1100-0x117f]
[    6.098034] pci 0000:01:00.0: BAR 3: assigned [io  0x1180-0x11ff]
[    6.098602] pci 0000:01:00.0: BAR 4: assigned [io  0x1200-0x127f]
[    6.099177] pci 0000:00:00.0: PCI bridge to [bus 01-ff]
[    6.099699] pci 0000:00:00.0:   bridge window [io  0x1000-0x1fff]
[    6.100286] pci 0000:00:00.0:   bridge window [mem 0xf4200000-0xf42fffff]
[    6.103291] pcieport 0000:00:00.0: PME: Signaling with IRQ 72
[    6.104665] pcieport 0000:00:00.0: AER: enabled with IRQ 72
[    6.343873] libata version 3.00 loaded.
[    6.364833] ahci 0000:01:00.0: version 3.0
[    6.365281] ahci 0000:01:00.0: enabling device (0000 -> 0003)
[    6.366819] ahci 0000:01:00.0: SSS flag set, parallel bus scan disabled
[    6.367777] ahci 0000:01:00.0: AHCI 0001.0301 32 slots 5 ports 6 Gbps 0x3 impl SATA mode
[    6.368527] ahci 0000:01:00.0: flags: 64bit ncq sntf stag pm led clo pmp fbs pio slum part ccc apst boh 
[    6.392020] scsi host0: ahci
[    6.401255] scsi host1: ahci
[    6.411971] scsi host2: ahci
[    6.414133] scsi host3: ahci
[    6.420383] scsi host4: ahci
[    6.421125] ata1: SATA max UDMA/133 abar m8192@0xf4210000 port 0xf4210100 irq 77
[    6.422276] ata2: SATA max UDMA/133 abar m8192@0xf4210000 port 0xf4210180 irq 78
[    6.422286] ata3: DUMMY
[    6.422291] ata4: DUMMY
[    6.422295] ata5: DUMMY
[    6.738282] ata1: SATA link down (SStatus 0 SControl 300)
[    7.054259] ata2: SATA link down (SStatus 0 SControl 300)

One noticeable difference is that Linux attaches the SATA adapter at 0xf4210000, which is a 1:1 mapped memory space, whereas FreeBSD attaches it at 0x40000000, which is mapped to 0x300000000.
